summary: Standardize CLAUDE.md across all conditions using shared BASE_CLAUDE_MD constant — baseline now gets project guidance
context: Shared-markdown had different CLAUDE.md content (Coordination section instead of File Organization), baseline had no CLAUDE.md at all. These uncontrolled variables confounded the comparison — conditions were being compared with different project guidance, not just different coordination mechanisms.
rationale: All conditions must receive identical project guidance so the ONLY variable is the coordination mechanism. BASE_CLAUDE_MD is defined once in BaseCondition. Each condition appends only its coordination-specific section (Coordination for shared-markdown, Context Management for file-reload-generic, etc.).

alternatives.option: Let each condition define its own CLAUDE.md independently
alternatives.reason_rejected: Creates uncontrolled variables. Differences in CLAUDE.md content (e.g., Testing section depth, File Organization presence) confound the coordination mechanism comparison.

alternatives.option: No CLAUDE.md for any condition (pure coordination mechanism test)
alternatives.reason_rejected: Unrealistic — real projects have documentation. Removing it would test a scenario that doesn't map to real development.
